name: python-plugin-monorepo
description: Python plugin monorepo (uv workspace). Library/framework with no deployable web server. Each subdirectory under plugins/ is its own pyproject.toml-managed package; shared/ holds cross-plugin scripts and profiles. No root dev server, no frontend.

folder_structure.plugins/: Per-SDLC-phase Claude Code plugins (each with .claude-plugin/, hooks/, skills/, scripts/, tests/, pyproject.toml)
